reviews.name: Sarika
reviews.text:
Our relative’s was admitted to Sri Chandra Multi Speciality Hospital in the ICU. During this difficult time, the care and service provided by the hospital were truly outstanding. The entire nursing staff treated the patient like their own family. Their communication was clear, friendly, and very supportive.

Among them, R. Naveen Kumar (Male Nurse) played a very special role. He took excellent care of our relative with great dedication. He was attentive to handling medications, monitoring, and comfort perfectly. His behavior gave confidence to the family and removed fear from the patient.His dedication and sense of responsibility are truly admirable and should be seen in every hospital.

Overall, I like and love R. Naveen Kumar, the Nursing Staff, and Sri Chandra Hospital. 🙏

reviews.text: Highly recommended hospital for kids, Dr Bharat is a skilled doctor. However, **DO NOT** consult the general physician of this hospital. If you want to live. Sushmitha who is so called general physician in this hospital does not even know to read the scan reports. Sushmitha, I hope you will reading my message. Karma's gonna hunt you down and you will regret why you became doctor in this life. I cannot mention every thing in this review section. But I repeat if you want to live, please don't consult general physician of this hospital.

reviews.name: Rakesh K
reviews.text: Good hospitality

reviews.name: Sangita Malick
reviews.text:
I visited this hospital for a health consultation. On the first day, my experience with the general physician was fine. The doctor was polite and listened properly. I was advised to undergo several tests, which I agreed to.
However, the experience completely went downhill after that. When I went to the lab for tests, the place was extremely dirty and unhygienic. Construction work was going on nearby, and the lab was full of dust. Even basic medical items like injection tubes, injection bottles, and sanitizer bottles were covered with dust. It did not look like a medical lab at all—more like a dusty construction site. This is very unsafe and unacceptable for a place where blood tests and injections are done.
On the next visit, I went to collect my reports and wanted to consult the same doctor, but she was unavailable as it was Sunday. Instead, I was assigned another doctor without being informed about his specialization. Later, I realized he was an infant/baby specialist. He seemed unsure while looking at my reports and did not properly read or explain them. Throughout the consultation, he appeared confused and only prescribed one or two medicines without clear guidance. The consultation felt rushed and unprofessional.
Overall, the experience was very pathetic. The hospital seriously needs to improve hygiene standards in the lab and ensure patients are guided to the correct doctor. Proper communication and professionalism are completely missing. I would not recommend this hospital unless major improvements are made.

reviews.text: Today I visited this hospital, and overall the services were acceptable. However, I was very disappointed with the condition of the washrooms. They were not clean and not well maintained, which is a serious concern in a hospital environment. Cleanliness and hygiene are very important for patients and visitors. I hope the management will take immediate action to improve the washroom facilities.
